_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- assess the full financial implication of a technology buying decision
- advise on the appropriate funding of shared technologies so that the cost is shared now and in future
- guide decision making on appropriate approaches for buying technology, services and human resources so that technology investments achieve organisational goals
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- explaining financial implications of purchasing technology, particularly where the full lifetime cost is unpredictable
- prioritising spending by balancing immediate problems with future uncertainties
- gaining support for your recommendations by explaining your decisions to finance, risk, and commercial colleagues at board level
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of technology vendor evaluation methodologies for data and AI platforms, including RFP and RFI processes, proof-of-concept design, total cost of ownership analysis, and vendor risk assessment.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.483), LS-T-008 (LS, cosine: 0.461).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.595). Shared vocabulary: [cost, risk, technology]. DDaT-only terms [achieve, advise, approaches, appropriate, assess, balancing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessment, concept, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.827 (P=0.813, R=0.842). R exceeds P by 0.029 — the WIDAI KSA's 27 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 103 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "You can:
- assess the full financial implication of a technology buying decision" and "Knowledge of technology vendor evaluation methodologies for data and AI platform" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.509 < STS 0.595 (gap -0.086). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [achieve, advise, approaches] and [ai, analysis, assessment] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.8%. Shared tokens: [cost, risk, technology]. DDaT-only: [achieve, advise, approaches, appropriate, assess, balancing]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessment, concept, data, design].
